description: Letter from Shelomo b. Eliyyahu (aka Barakāt b. Abū l-Faraj al-Dayyān) to a physician named Abū l-Maḥāsin (titled al-Shaykh al-Sadīd). In Arabic script with one word in Hebrew. Dating: Early 13th century. The first ~9 lines are standard introductory fare and blessings for the holidays. The last two lines probably contain a request concerning Dāʾūd al-[...]. The letter may have been abandoned unfinished.
